programmes.show_description: Over-bearded men and leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the West Coast, the underground and the counterculture of the 1970s.
5 hours of flashbacks from the swinging 60s! Including Johnny Cash, Sam Cooke, The Kinks, Lulu, The Beach Boys, The Beatles, The Troggs, Bob Dylan, The Rolling Stones & Elvis.
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
50 love songs - a lesson from the 70s followed by another from the 80s! Including Debby Boone, Hot Chocolate, Bette Midler, Neil Diamond and Roberta Flack.
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Incredible facts and amazing trivia about some of the decade's most famous songs and videos! This is two hours of Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes asking 'Can You Believe It?!'

programmes.show_name: What The Heck Kept This Off No.1?
programmes.show_description: Every one of these superb No.2 hits from 1970-1979 is a classic, but what other songs stopped each of them getting to the top? Queen, Ringo, Elton, Boney M and more are all here!
Seventies music power to play loud! Work out your speakers with some pure power pop and rock including Edwin Starr, Free, and The Quo!
Seventies music power to play loud! Work out your speakers with some pure power pop and rock including Cher, Slade, and the Stones!
Seventies music power to play loud! Work out your speakers with some pure power pop and rock including Queen, Slade, and Alice Cooper!
Dig out your flares or your ripped jeans - whatever turns you on! It's our ultimate 70s school disco countdown, whether you like a bit of punk or a slice of bubblegum pop.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
The ever-smooth Simes dusts off his flares, fires up the lava lamp & takes you on a psychedelic spin through the 70s. Side effects may include sudden urges to perm your hair!
The ever-smooth Simes dusts off his flares, fires up the lava lamp & takes you on a psychedelic spin through the 70s. Side effects may include sudden urges to perm your hair!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
Experience the magic of 1979 & relive the closing days of disco & punk. Including Chic, Rose Royce, Michael Jackson, The Police & Ian Dury.
Experience the magic of 1978 & relive the golden days of disco & punk. Including Bee Gees, Buzzcocks, Boney M & Blondie.
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
Experience the magic of 1975 & relive a year ablaze with excitement including groudbreaking music from Bay City Rollers, Rod Stewart, Steve Harley & Queen.
Twenty-five videos you'd probably forgotten, some of which you hoped you'd never see again! Stand by for Boney M, David Soul, Mary MacGregor, Badfinger and Kate Bush.
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
2 hours of superbly crafted songs inspired by different regions of the world. Including Simon & Garfunkel, Cat Stevens, James Taylor, Janice Joplin, Bob Dylan & Neil Young.
All 7 music videos and the theme song from the 1978 movie in order - you know the story, and we're all hopelessly devoted to the tunes! They'll go by like Greased Lightnin'!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
We're bringing the spring sunshine to you - 70s style! Every vid is full of outdoor fun - with Elton & ELO, David Soul & David Cassidy, Bee Gees & Boney M!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Every song comes from that vintage year when the sun shone all summer & Dave's band Showaddywaddy had their big number 1. Queen, Leo Sayer, Abba & Smokie also kept the hits coming.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
6 electrifying hours of power pop & rock legends! Every track's a banger, guaranteed to rock your socks off - if your speakers had muscles, this is what they would play!
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From AC/DC & Led Zep, to Bowie & Black Sabbath - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
